name: Open-Source Weights Leak
text1: Weights from an older AI model appear on a file-sharing site.
text2: Near-frontier model weights are leaked online. Researchers worldwide begin unlocking its full capabilities.
image-prompt: A laptop screen showing a download progress bar at 99% with model weight files, surrounded by dozens of other screens in a dark room all showing the same download, viral spread feeling, digital painting, no text
